title: 24Pack Plastic Dinner Plates, 7in Plastic Plates Reusable Camping Plates, Round Dinner Plates Assorted Colours Picnic Plates for Home, Office, Party - Dishwasher & Microwave Safe
features: 【Package & Szie】Include 24pcs plastic dinner plates, 12 colours. Size: 17.5cm/6.9in
【Premium Material】The reusable plate is made of food-grade PP plastic, BPA-free, lightweight and unbreakable, easy to carry, don't worry about falling down
【Stackable & Reusable】The flat design makes the plastic plates easy to stack, space saving, light to hold and easy to drop, and reusable

【Microwave & Dishwasher Safe】Our plastic plates are dishwasher and microwave safe, easy to clean and work well in the microwave. Note: Do not microwave on high for more than 3 minutes and are temperature resistant up to 120°C / +248°F

【Wide Application】The dinner plates are available in 12 different colours to give you a pleasant experience. These delicate plates can hold a variety of foods and are perfect for parties, picnics, camping, barbecues, hiking and everyday meals
description: Product Description 24PCS Unbreakable Plastic Plates, 17cm Lightweight Camping Picnic Plates, Reusable Plastic Plate Set for Party, Home, Dishwasher & Microwave Safe Specification: Material: PP Plastic Diameter: 17.5cm/6.9in Height: 2.5cm/1in Shape: Round Color: 12 Colours Packaging Includes: 24 x Plastic Dinner Plates
